present_usage.summary: Supportive or healing in tone, especially in health or emotional contexts.

examples.text: The word therapeutic changes what claims the agent may safely make.

expansion.paragraph: therapeutic is represented here as a semantic-control term: its present usage and pragmatic force help decide whether an agent should ask, check evidence, avoid overclaiming, or revise before export.
